regime_fall.current_status: Ceasefire rapidly deteriorating as of April 9 with Israeli strikes killing 250+ in Beirut while US threatens imminent strikes on Iranian infrastructure; Iran maintains conditional two-week truce but signals withdrawal if Lebanon attacks continue, creating escalation spiral with Trump deadline pressure and Strait of Hormuz tensions.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Israel conducted large-scale airstrikes in central Beirut on April 9, killing over 250 people, prompting Iran to demand Lebanon's inclusion in ceasefire and threatening withdrawal from two-week conditional truce.
